questions.question: What TV duo did the New York Times sum up as "the latest link in the Darwinian descent of the American adolescent"?
What woman inspired many men to begin sleeping on their bellies, in 1993?
What Greek wrote Meteorologica, popularizing that name for the study of weather?
Who's won more Ryder Cup matches than any golfer in history, through 1997?
What reporter's "Fu Manchu eyebrows arch and dip like marmosets stretching their backs," according to George magazine?
